name: MK-677
subtitle: Ghrelin Receptor Agonist | Oral Growth Hormone Secretagogue
overview: Oral compound activating ghrelin receptors to trigger growth hormone release while preserving natural production. Achieves superior oral bioavailability exceeding 60% with a 24-hour half-life, making it unique among GH secretagogues for its convenient once-daily oral dosing.
mechanism: Selectively binds GHS-R1a receptors in hypothalamus and pituitary, triggering pulsatile growth hormone release while maintaining natural circadian patterns.
keyBenefits: Enhanced sleep quality with improved REM patterns
Preferential lean tissue gains of 1.1-2.7kg over 8-12 months
15% basal metabolic rate increase within 2 weeks

items.name: GH Restoration
items.description: Restores youthful growth hormone levels in elderly subjects with 97% increase in 24-hour secretion.

items.name: IGF-1 Enhancement
items.description: Sustained 40-72% IGF-1 elevation over extended periods.

items.name: Sleep Enhancement
items.description: 20% REM increase in younger adults; 50% improvement in elderly.

items.name: Muscle Preservation
items.description: Demonstrates +2.69g/day nitrogen retention versus -8.97g/day placebo, protecting lean mass during caloric restriction.

items.name: Fat-Free Mass
items.description: Increases fat-free mass with preferential lean tissue accrual.

items.name: Metabolic Rate
items.description: 15% basal metabolic rate elevation documented at 2 weeks.

items.name: Bone Formation
items.description: 39-45% increase in bone formation markers within 6-8 weeks.

deliveryMethods.overview: Optimal bioavailability eliminates injection requirements with convenient daily dosing. Take at bedtime on empty stomach for best results.

interactions.notes: Complementary GH pathways providing combined pulsatile and baseline elevation.
Both stimulate GH release through different mechanisms.
MK-677 baseline elevation combines with GHRP-2 pulsatile spikes.
Systemic growth factors complement localized healing.
MK-677 decreases insulin sensitivity; requires blood glucose monitoring.
Case report documents 85.7% testosterone suppression and significant liver enzyme elevation when combined.

timeline.effects: Improved sleep quality, vivid dreams, possible appetite increase
Enhanced recovery, better sleep architecture, initial body composition changes
Noticeable lean mass gains, continued sleep benefits
Maximum body composition improvements, sustained GH elevation

stopSigns: Shortness of breath, chest pain, or unusual fatigue
Blood glucose levels >100mg/dL or diabetes symptoms
Severe fluid retention or unexplained swelling
contraindications: Heart disease or congestive heart failure

warning: Products labeled 'for research only' may lack quality control
bad: Dietary supplement claims (FDA prohibits MK-677 in supplements)
Unknown purity or source without certificates of analysis
Unusually low prices suggesting counterfeit product

references.title: Growth Hormone Stimulation in Elderly
references.keyFindings: 25mg oral daily for 2 weeks showed 97% increase in 24-hour GH secretion in elderly adults.

references.title: Body Composition in Obese Subjects
references.keyFindings: 25mg oral daily for 2 months increased fat-free mass and energy expenditure in obese adults.

references.title: Reversal of Diet-Induced Catabolism
references.keyFindings: 25mg oral daily for 7 days showed nitrogen retention of +2.69g/day versus placebo -8.97g/day.

references.title: Sleep Quality Improvement Study
references.keyFindings: 25mg oral daily for 1 week showed 20% REM increase in young adults; 50% in elderly.

references.title: Bone Turnover Markers Study
references.keyFindings: 25mg oral daily for 2 months showed 39-45% increase in bone formation markers in elderly adults.

latestResearch.title: FDA Warning: Potential Health Risks of MK-677
latestResearch.summary: Official communication highlighting significant cardiovascular risks and investigational drug status.

quickStats.typicalDose: Start 12.5mg daily, increase to 25mg based on tolerance
quickStats.frequency: Once daily, preferably at bedtime on empty stomach
quickStats.storage: Room temperature in cool, dry place; no refrigeration required
